providing bubbly beverages for you to enjoy since 2005

The Founder and How He Created Hipster Soda.

The founder, Samuel Hipster, started his journey in the soda industry with a simple idea: to create a drink that would stand out from the crowd. With his innovative approach and passion for creating unique flavor combinations, he built Hipster Soda into the beloved brand it is today.

Samuel was born on May 9th, 1980 in Austin, Texas. From a young age, he had a passion for creating unique flavors and experimenting with different ingredients. and throughout his childhood he learned how flavors could be combined to create something truly special.

In 2015 Samuel decided to quit his job at a local brewery and dedicate himself to creating the perfect soda. for the first few years that Hipster existed, Samuel suffered through many challenges until he found the perfect balance of flavors. Samuel created Hipsters first flavor, a refreshing blend of raspberry and strawberry. but the company would only be a success in Texas. until 2022 during the pandemic where several local influencers would notice the brand and begin spreading the word about Hipsters unique flavors.

Today, Hipster Soda is enjoyed by people all over the world, and Samuel's vision of creating unique and delicious sodas continues to inspire new flavors and innovations.
